creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
At http://www.freebsd.org/handbook/linuxemu.html there is still quite some
information of Linux Mode under FreeBSD-2.1.

As that version is rather old and Linux Mode there does not support most
current Linux software, I suggest to remove:
          22.1.3. Installing Linux Mode in 2.1-STABLE
